name: apxm
description: APXM orchestration workflows for Codex: goal orchestration, autonomous loop specs, councils, verified workers, AIR execution, skill-to-workflow conversion, trace verification, and workflow following.

interface.longDescription: APXM packages reusable Codex skills for creating bounded goal orchestration passes, designing APXM-owned event-triggered loop specs, selecting verified workers, running traceable multi-perspective councils, converting skills into APXM workflows, executing APXM AIR through APXM server/Dekk, following live/offline workflow progress, and verifying traces.
defaultPrompt: Run an APXM Council on this decision.
Use APXM to orchestrate this task across agents.
Design an APXM autonomous event loop for this workflow.
Ask an APXM worker to propose an AIR workflow.
Follow this APXM workflow and replay its rollout.
